title: PH PandaHall 1440 Strips 52.5cm Quilling Paper, 36 Colours Quilling Kits for Adults 3mm Paper Star Strips Quilling Butterfly Supplies Craft Gift Cards Bags Picture Frames Scrapbooking
features: Colorful Quilling Strips: You will receive 1440 strips quilling paper in total, including 36 colors. Sufficient quantity to meet your crafts working needs. You can also share with your families and friends any time.

Detail Size: The paper quilling kit is measured about 52.5cm in length, 3mm in width. These strips are so thin that suitable for making creative projects, such as flowers, leaves, small animals projects, etc.

Quality Material: The quilling paper strips is made of quality paper, durable and smoothly to roll, not too flimsy and not too stiff, which can be used for any roll any shapes you want even 3D quilling projects.

Wide Application: The quilling paper set is suitable for paper quilling crafts projects, from easy quilling coil to even 3D quilling objects to decorate card projects or gift bags, scrapbooking, picture frame, etc.

Enjoy DIY Fun: The colorful strips can not only stimulate your imagination and enrich your creative projects, but also can improve your hands-on skills. Perfect quilling suppiles for any quilling starter.
description: Specification: Brand: PH PandaHall Material: paper. Colour: Melangee. Size: about 525mm long, 3mm wide, about 360strips/bag, 36colors/bag. A good choice for classroom decoration, shop, wedding, party, holiday, decoration by fixing light on ceiling, wall, window, etc. It is also a great gift for someone who loves or is ideal to add to the Crafter collection.
